condition: Immaculate 95% new premium condition used Caterpillar 320D excavator, glossy original paint, flawless hydraulic pumps and CAT C6.4 engine, fully certified and SGS inspected.
longDescription: This immaculate 95% new used caterpillar-320d-excavator represents the absolute gold standard in the 20-ton class machinery market. Sourced directly from a low-hour project, this used caterpillar-320d-excavator has undergone a rigorous 120-point SGS health audit to ensure 100% factory performance. Buyers seeking a used caterpillar-320d-excavator with original Cat C6.4 ACERT engine and pristine hydraulic pumps will find this unit exceptional. Every detail of this used caterpillar-320d-excavator, from the reinforced boom to the immaculate operator cabin, is designed for maximum uptime on your construction site.
features: Original CAT C6.4 ACERT Engine with unmatched fuel efficiency
World-class hydraulic system for smooth and precise multi-function control
Reinforced heavy-duty boom and stick for extreme durability
Premium ergonomic cabin with superior visibility and climate control
95% new undercarriage components with low ground pressure
whyChooseUs: Direct yard sourcing ensuring the best wholesale export prices
120-point SGS technical inspection certificate provided with every unit
Worldwide logistics network covering major ports in Africa, Middle East, and SEA
24/7 technical support and maintenance guidance via WhatsApp/Email
Complete customs export declaration and shipping documentation service

faqs.q: What is the actual fuel consumption of this used caterpillar-320d-excavator?
faqs.a: The CAT 320D is highly efficient, consuming approximately 15-18 liters per hour under standard heavy-duty operation.

faqs.q: Is the main hydraulic pump original factory-installed?
faqs.a: Yes, we guarantee that all major components, including the main pump and engine, are original factory parts with no reconstruction.

faqs.q: Can you provide a live video walk-around of this machine?
faqs.a: Certainly! We can schedule a live WhatsApp video call to show you the engine startup, hydraulic response, and overall condition.

faqs.q: What shipping options are available for the Middle East?
faqs.a: We offer both 40HQ container and Flat Rack options depending on your budget and required delivery speed to ports like Jebel Ali or Jeddah.

features: 95% New Component Status: Pristine original paint and unworn mechanical joints.

faqs.q: What is the lifting capacity of this used Komatsu PC210 excavator?
faqs.a: The PC210 has a maximum lift capacity of approximately 5,800 kg at ground level, making it highly versatile for utility work and construction.

faqs.q: How do you verify it's really 95% new?
faqs.a: We use digital ultrasonic testing on track links and pressure gauges on the main pump to verify factory-level performance metrics.

faqs.q: Is the engine original Komatsu or reconstructed?
faqs.a: We guarantee 100% original Komatsu SAA6D107E-1 engines with original serial numbers and no major repairs.

faqs.q: Can you ship to Nigeria or Ghana?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide monthly shipping routes to major West African ports like Lagos and Tema with secure lashing and insurance.

longDescription: This 95% new used Volvo EC140 excavator offers a superior combination of power and fuel economy, making it the top choice for utility and general construction work. Sourced from a well-maintained low-hour project, this used Volvo EC140 excavator features the original high-torque Volvo D4 engine, which has been rigorously tested for zero emissions compliance and maximum durability. International contractors seeking a high-value used Volvo EC140 excavator will benefit from its optimized hydraulic flow and the world-class CareCab™ cabin designed for long-shift operator productivity. Our used Volvo EC140 excavator inventory has passed a 120-point SGS audit to ensure factory-standard operational performance.

faqs.q: What is the typical fuel saving on this used Volvo EC140 excavator?
faqs.a: Thanks to Volvo's advanced G-Mode hydraulics, this machine can save up to 10-15% more fuel than older models in the same tonnage class.

faqs.q: Is the D4 engine original or has it been rebuilt?
faqs.a: We guarantee 100% original Volvo D4 engines with original factory seals and verified serial numbers.

faqs.q: How do you protect the machine during sea transport?
faqs.a: Every unit is steam-cleaned, coated with protective anti-rust wax, and professionally lashed with heavy-duty steel chains in 40HQ or Flat-Rack containers.

faqs.q: Can you provide the original Volvo software diagnostic report?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide the MATRIS diagnostic report showing machine usage patterns, engine load factors, and idle times.
